top3.sql:
SELECT Street, City, Zip, State
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode = (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM frpm
    WHERE `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)` IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)` ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT Street, City, Zip, State
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode = (
    SELECT CDSCode
    FROM frpm
    WHERE `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)` IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY `Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)` ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.Zip, s.State
FROM schools s
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE f.`Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)` IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY CAST(f.`Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)` AS REAL) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT Street, City, Zip, State
FROM schools
WHERE CDSCode = (
